extensions.name: Custom Home Page
extensions.description: Replaces the default home page with an enhanced dashboard featuring recent activity, statistics, and quick actions.
extensions.author: Cove Team

extensions.name: Scene Analytics
extensions.description: Adds play count tracking and analytics tab to scene details with viewing history and statistics.
extensions.author: Cove Team

extensions.name: Notification Settings
extensions.description: Adds notification preferences to extension settings, allowing users to configure alerts for scan completion, metadata updates, and more.
extensions.author: Cove Team
